SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF MEGAN HANSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHELLE LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATED ON THE RECORD AN UPDATE TO HER ADDRESS. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVE THEIR CASE HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANSON, MEGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, MICHELLE $2,413.24 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,413.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
